events.description: segment opens, 'Merging' title with GitMerge icon fades in
'Where the magic happens' subtitle text fades in
Branch A commit nodes start appearing right-to-left with spring pop
Branch B commit nodes start appearing, both branch lines drawing out
Common ancestor node GLOWS bright amber — key moment, large pulsing node with 60px glow
'COMMON ANCESTOR' label text appears below the glowing node
'Then it compares the trees...' text slides up
Scene 1 crossfades to Scene 2 — split view conflict vs auto-merge
Conflict side: two file icons (Branch A, Branch B) slide in pointing at same file
'same file' label appears, file icons get red glow
'same line' label and conflict code block (<<<<<<< markers) appear
MERGE CONFLICT badge pops in with red warning icon, shakes briefly — dramatic moment
Auto-merge side: two different file icons (app.ts, utils.ts) slide in
AUTO-MERGED success badge pops in green with checkmark
Scene 2 crossfades to Scene 3 — three-way merge visualization
'Three-Way Merge' title fades in
ANCESTOR source box with tree icon and code placeholder pops in
YOURS source box with branch icon pops in
THEIRS source box with branch icon pops in
Three convergence arrows draw from sources toward center
MERGE COMMIT result node pops in with green glow — final combined result
